edges.note: DistributionalCoupling extends CouplingScorer with kurtosis sensitivity.
CouplingScorer is susceptible to Megethos unless normalized.
Same Megethos issue for distributional scorer.
Categorical object-keyed scorer breaks where distributional scorer fails, and vice versa.
First-gap analysis often does the job without full unfolding.
Prime decontamination must run before any numerical coupling on scalar features.
Conductor and rank stratifications can be applied jointly.
F1 label shuffle catches less than F39 feature permutation for representation artifacts.
ADE-type via Galois label is a coarse proxy for the actual object-keyed Galois scorer.
P104 description quote: 'Stricter than P040 when test axis correlates with confound.' P104 block-shuffle is P040 restricted to within-stratum shuffles; strictly a specialization.
P035 description quote: 'Finer than P026 semistable vs additive.' Kodaira symbols further split the semistable/additive binary into Tate’s full classification.
P035 description quote: 'Tautology-adjacent to P021 (Kodaira type constrains bad-prime Tamagawa contribution).'

P036 description quote: 'Equivalent to (−1)^rank under BSD parity; so on EC families this aliases P023 rank parity and P028 Katz-Sarnak SO_even/SO_odd. Independent projection only for non-EC L-function families.'
P036 description quote: 'Equivalent to (−1)^rank under BSD parity; so on EC families this aliases P023 rank parity and P028 Katz-Sarnak SO_even/SO_odd.'
